---
title: "Contact"
format: html
---

If any of what I do interests you, get in touch.

::: {.contact-info}
- **Email**: [shamanth.kuthpadi@gmail.com](mailto:shamanth.kuthpadi@gmail.com)
- **LinkedIn**: [Shamanth Kuthpadi](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shamanth-kuthpadi/)
- **GitHub**: [shamanth-kuthpadi](https://github.com/shamanth-kuthpadi)
:::
